title: Audit Evidence
description: Unified evidence shape produced by one audit-axis sub-pipeline (webui screenshots, code walk, db trace, or event trace). The audit-issue parent pipeline aggregates these into a single evidence set keyed by axis.

axis.description: Which evidence axis produced this artifact. Discriminator for downstream gap enumeration.

issue_ref.description: The audit subject — populated by the parent pipeline when this evidence is generated as part of an audit-issue run.

items.description: Per-axis evidence entries. Schema differs by axis; consumers branch on `axis`.

id.description: Stable identifier within this evidence set (e.g. `e1`, `e2`).

summary.description: One-paragraph human-readable summary of this axis's findings. Synthesised by the synthesize step.

captured_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the evidence was collected.
